---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect so it can be reproduced and fixed
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, paste screenshots, server logs (`packages/server`), or browser console output. Redact anything sensitive (tokens, emails, license keys).

## Environment
- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- Node version: <!-- output of `node -v` -->
- Yarn version: <!-- output of `yarn -v` -->
- Stacks package(s) affected: <!-- e.g. @stacks/server 1.0.117, @stacks/app 1.0.67 -->
- Browser (if applicable): <!-- e.g. Chrome 124 -->
- Database: <!-- Postgres version -->

## Additional context
Anything else that might help — config changes, recent migrations, related issues.
